completedPhases: Phase 1: Backend Setup and API Contract
Phase 3: UI Integration and FreshBooks API
remainingPhases: Phase 2: Demo Document Generation and Data Handling
nextPhaseDescription: The next round should focus on completing Phase 0 and Phase 2. For Phase 0, conduct a thorough audit of the existing UI, document all buttons, actions, and expected outputs, and define the flow process and data requirements for demo documents. For Phase 2, develop templates for demo documents using Handlebars, implement PDF generation using PDFKit, create seed data files in JSON format, set up SQLite for data storage, and implement CSV file upload and parsing functionality.
